infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: JourneyHawk uses Bluetooth to detect nearby Pico mesh nodes for group tracking.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: JourneyHawk uses Bluetooth to detect nearby Pico mesh nodes for group tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: JourneyHawk needs your location to keep you safe during trips.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: JourneyHawk needs your location to track your group even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: JourneyHawk needs your location to track your group for safety.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: JourneyHawk uses Bluetooth to detect nearby Pico mesh nodes for group tracking.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow JourneyHawk to track your location for safety during trips.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow JourneyHawk to track your location while using the app.
